citation_title: IPS CPG: Anxiety Disorders (verify exact title)
last_reviewed_by: PLACEHOLDER - not yet reviewed; verify against source and sign off

rules.explanation_for_clinician: SSRIs are first-line pharmacotherapy for generalized anxiety disorder and panic disorder; CBT is an effective first-line alternative or adjunct.
In panic disorder, begin SSRIs at a low dose to limit initial activation/jitteriness, then titrate.
monitoring_required: Start low and titrate; review early-treatment activation.
